title: troximon odoratum
intro: Troximon odoratum, also known as stinking camomile or fetid camomile, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits associated with Troximon odoratum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Troximon odoratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
